THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, DOUG SCOTT, PEGGY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DHADHAL, NARESH OASIS INN. OASIS INN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,215.00, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. PLAINTIFF FOUND A USED SYRINGE AND BLODY RAG IN THE MOTEL ROOM THEY RENTED. THEY ARE ENTITLED TO RECOVER $3000.00 TO PAY FOR COST OF ROOM PLUS ANXIETY AND MENTAL ANGUISH THEY SUFFERED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-145 JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS TO PROCESS (REQUEST FORWARDED TO ACCT DEPT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, DOUG SCOTT, PEGGY AS TO DEFENDANT DHADHAL, NARESH OASIS INN.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, DOUG SCOTT, PEGGY AS TO DEFENDANT DHADHAL, NARESH OASIS INN. OASIS INN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DOUG SCOTT AND PEGGY SCOTT ARE PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT NARESH DHADAL IS PRESENT. OASIS INN, REPRESENTED BY NARESH DHADHAL, GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT REVIEWS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED BY MAIL. TRIAL BRIEF OF DEFENDANT IS REVIEWED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES THE COURT WITH HIS ADDRESS IN AUSTRALIA (UNIT 8/69 THUNDER ST., NORTH BENDIGO, VICTORIA AUSTRALIA 3550) ALL NOTICES ARE TO BE SENT TO THE ADDRESS LISTED ON PLIANTIFF'S CLAIM C/O SMALL CLAIMS MANAGEMENT, 235 MONTGOMERY ST. SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94104. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT DHADHAL, NARESH OASIS INN.
